meta.title: Web Design & Development
meta.description: Professional web design and development services using open-source technologies. Modern, responsive websites built for sustainability and performance.

hero.title: Web Design & Development
hero.subtitle: 100% commitment to freedom through open source, decentralization, privacy, data ownership, code ownership, and maximum automation. We create digital experiences where effort becomes a choice, not a necessity.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: Every website we build serves one ultimate goal: your freedom. Every principle works together to transform effort from necessity into choice.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Transparent, auditable code that you can fully inspect, modify, and own. No proprietary black boxes or vendor lock-ins.

decentralization.title: Decentralization
decentralization.description: Break free from Big Tech platforms. Host your website anywhere, preserve your independence, and avoid single points of failure.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.description: Minimal tracking, secure authentication, and transparent data handling. Your users' privacy is protected by design, not as an afterthought.

ownYourData.title: Own Your Data
ownYourData.description: Your data belongs to you, not the tech giants. Full control over where it is stored, how it is used, and who accesses it.

ownYourCode.title: Own Your Code
ownYourCode.description: Complete ownership of your website's source code. Modify, extend, or migrate at any time without restrictions or licensing fees.

maxAutomation.title: Maximum Automation
maxAutomation.description: Seamless automated workflows that minimize manual effort while upholding all our core principles. 100% automation is our goal.

userExperience.title: User Experience
userExperience.description: Intuitive interfaces that demand minimal effort from users while delivering maximum functionality and productivity.

developerExperience.title: Developer Experience
developerExperience.description: Clean, maintainable code with excellent tooling and documentation, making development and maintenance a pleasure.

philosophy.title: Our Freedom-First Philosophy
philosophy.intro: We believe in 100% commitment to freedom through maximum automation.
philosophy.automation: When automation minimizes unwanted effort, it transforms effort from necessity into choice — and choice is freedom.

freedomPrinciple.label: The Freedom Principle
freedomPrinciple.text: 100% commitment to freedom means every aspect of your digital presence should serve your autonomy, not restrict it.

automationLiberation.label: Automation as Liberation
automationLiberation.text: Maximum automation eliminates repetitive, unwanted tasks, giving you the freedom to focus on what truly matters to you and your mission.

choiceNotCoercion.label: Choice Over Coercion
choiceNotCoercion.text: When systems work seamlessly without your constant intervention, every moment you invest becomes intentional — a choice, not a necessity.

philosophy.quote: True freedom is not just the ability to choose — it's systems that preserve your right to choose by eliminating forced effort.
philosophy.ratingIntro: Every website and web app we build receives a comprehensive freedom rating based on how well it supports your autonomy:

commitment.label: Our Commitment
commitment.text: We aim for maximum scores across all freedom dimensions. Every trade-off is discussed transparently, with alternatives always explored.

servicesSection.title: Our Web Development Services
servicesSection.subtitle: Comprehensive web solutions built with open-source technologies and sustainable practices.
servicesSection.consultationText: We begin every project with a thorough consultation to understand your needs, goals, and technical requirements. This helps us deliver accurate estimates and ensure we are the right fit for your project.

customDev.title: Custom Web Development
customDev.description: Tailor-made web applications built with modern open-source technologies to meet your specific business requirements.

responsiveDesign.title: Responsive Web Design
responsiveDesign.description: Beautiful, user-friendly designs that work flawlessly across all devices and screen sizes.

cmsDev.title: CMS Development
cmsDev.description: Modern content management systems that give you full control over your website content with developer-friendly APIs.

maintenance.title: Website Maintenance
maintenance.description: Ongoing support and maintenance to keep your website secure, up-to-date, and performing at its best.

whyOpenSource.title: Why These Values Matter
whyOpenSource.subtitle: In an era of increasing digital surveillance and platform monopolies, these principles are not just nice-to-haves — they are essential for digital freedom and independence.

ownCode.title: You Own Your Code
ownCode.description: Full ownership of your website's source code means no vendor lock-in, no licensing restrictions, and complete freedom to modify, extend, or migrate your site at any time.

ownData.title: You Own Your Data
ownData.description: Your data belongs to you, not the tech giants. We develop solutions that keep your information under your control, with options for self-hosting and data portability.

privacyByDesign.title: Privacy by Design
privacyByDesign.description: We prioritize privacy from the ground up, implementing minimal tracking, secure authentication, and transparent data handling practices that respect your users' privacy.

decentralized.title: Decentralized Architecture
decentralized.description: Break free from centralized platforms that control your online presence. We develop solutions that can be hosted anywhere, giving you independence from Big Tech.

openSourceBase.title: Open-Source Foundation
openSourceBase.description: Built on open-source technologies that are transparent, auditable, and backed by global communities. No hidden code, no proprietary lock-ins.

futureProof.title: Future-Proof & Sustainable
futureProof.description: Open-source technologies evolve with the community and don't disappear when a company fails. Your investment is protected for the long term.

technologies.title: Technologies We Use
technologies.subtitle: We work with proven open-source technologies that deliver reliability, performance, and long-term sustainability.

nextjs.description: Modern React framework for building fast, scalable web applications with excellent developer experience and built-in optimization.

tailwind.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapidly building modern, responsive UIs with consistent design.

supabase.description: Open-source Firebase alternative providing instant APIs, real-time subscriptions, authentication, and edge functions.

strapi.description: Leading open-source headless CMS giving developers the freedom to choose their preferred tools and frameworks.

payload.description: TypeScript-first headless CMS and application framework built with Node.js, React, and MongoDB.

tina.description: Git-based headless CMS that enables content editing directly on your website with real-time visual editing.

wordpress.description: Mature content management system still popular for certain use cases. We can work with existing WordPress sites.

joomla.description: Flexible content management system with robust user management and multilingual features. Ideal for complex websites.

woocommerce.description: Widely used open-source e-commerce platform built on WordPress. Flexible extensions and large community.

shopware.description: Modern API-first e-commerce platform with powerful customization capabilities. Open-source core with commercial extensions.

hosting.name: Deployment & Hosting
hosting.description: Flexible hosting options from open-source solutions on Linux servers to modern platforms like Vercel and Netlify.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our Web Development Services?
benefits.subtitle: We combine technical expertise with sustainable practices to deliver websites that perform excellently while supporting your values.

automationFirst.title: Automation-First Design
automationFirst.description: We prioritize automated workflows that minimize manual administrative effort while upholding all our core principles. Maximum efficiency without compromise.

openSourceBase.title: Open-Source Foundation
openSourceBase.description: Built on transparent, auditable technologies that give you complete control and freedom. No vendor lock-in, no proprietary black boxes.

seamlessUX.title: Seamless User Experience
seamlessUX.description: Intuitive interfaces that demand minimal effort from users while delivering maximum functionality. Every interaction is designed for simplicity and effectiveness.

devFriendly.title: Developer-Friendly Architecture
devFriendly.description: Clean, maintainable code with excellent documentation and tooling. Built for long-term sustainability and easy maintenance.

process.title: Our Development Process
process.subtitle: We follow a collaborative, transparent process that ensures your project meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We start with a thorough consultation to understand your goals, requirements, and target audience.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: We create a detailed project plan including timeline, technology stack, and design approach.

development.title: Development
development.description: We build your website following agile methodology with regular updates and feedback sessions.

launch.title: Launch & Support
launch.description: We launch your website and provide ongoing support, maintenance, and optimization.

cta.title: Ready to build your website?
cta.subtitle: Let's create a website that reflects your values and achieves your goals. Contact us today for a free consultation.
